reasoning: WEAK_BULL ribbon (8¢ spread) with price 5¢ above pivot suggests structural weakness despite bullish stack. Overnight gap up $2.97 is the primary bullish signal, but contradicted by risk-off sector rotation (XLK −1.22%, XLF −2.01%) and doji-ish bar structures with small bodies. Last 3 bars (05:45–05:55) show RED-GREEN-GREEN mixed pattern with <40% bodies. Premarket established $3.99 range (634.03–638.02) showing volatility but no directional conviction yet. Price operating within ribbon noise (5¢ separation) is functionally equivalent to CHOP setup. Edge exists (gap-up narrative) but execution is marginal — recommend caution and wait for tighter structure confirmation.
